title: When Escom bought Commodore
content:
Escom acquired Commodore on April 22, 1995 for $14 million. At the time, it seemed like Commodore’s long nightmare might be over. The Amiga had a new owner. Sadly, it didn’t work out that way. Escom: Well known in Europe,

The post When Escom bought Commodore appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
